steps.title: Identify what needs explaining
steps.content: Both noise conditions reduce diving, but the two exposure types had nearly identical effects — adding sonic pulses on top of ship sounds barely changed anything. We need a reason why adding pulses didn't matter.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
If ship sounds already dominate the soundscape, then adding sonic pulses doesn't meaningfully alter the auditory environment — explaining the negligible difference. Choice C states this directly.

A would predict more effect, not less. B contradicts the data (effects were significant). D would predict differences between conditions, not similarity.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
